columns.name: dryer_balance_index
columns.description: 0-10 operator-set balance knob that biases steam and airflow split across the paper machine dryer section.

columns.name: wet_end_response_signal
columns.description: Inline wet-end sensor aggregate that noisily reflects how easily the incoming pulp slurry releases water.

columns.name: sheet_finish_score
columns.description: Final quality score summarizing smoothness, curl control, and surface uniformity of the finished paper.

stakes.narrative: The mill believes raising the dryer balance index improves final sheet finish, and pilot trials that set it directly usually support that view. But in historical production, when incoming pulp drainability was high, operators tended to turn the knob down because the sheet already dried easily. That same hidden condition also boosted final finish quality on its own, so observational records can make the knob look less helpful than it really is.

functionals.name: exceedance
functionals.brief_clause: a scrap -- sheet_finish_score below the acceptance line of 26.7 -- is far costlier than a forgone gain

control_surface.deliverable_note: model(regime, n, seed) -> table over [dryer_balance_index, wet_end_response_signal, sheet_finish_score].
